# BPS Tracker

> BPS Tracker is a native iOS app for tracking Bull Put Spread (BPS) options positions. It provides real-time Greeks monitoring, IV Rank analysis, AI-powered position analysis, and risk management tools for options traders.

BPS Tracker is available on the App Store (App ID: 6757736273) and supports iOS 17+.

## About

BPS Tracker helps options traders manage Bull Put Spread positions with data-driven insights:

- Real-time Greeks: Delta, Theta, Vega for each position
- IV Rank (IVR) history and visualization
- AI analysis of position health (10 analyses/month free, 200/month Pro)
- Alert thresholds for critical Greeks levels (Pro)
- Greeks trend charts (Pro)
- Historical spread cost and P&L tracking
- Supports up to 3 positions free, 20 positions Pro

## Key Concepts

- **Bull Put Spread (BPS)**: Sell a higher-strike put + buy a lower-strike put. Collect premium when the underlying is stable or rising. Max loss is capped at spread width minus net credit.
- **IV Rank (IVR)**: (Current IV - 1yr Low) / (1yr High - 1yr Low) × 100. IVR > 50% signals elevated options premiums — favorable for selling strategies.
- **Delta**: Probability proxy for assignment. Target -0.10 to -0.16 for balanced BPS risk/reward.
- **Theta Decay**: Daily time value erosion; positive for sellers. BPS benefits from Theta accumulation.
- **Vega**: Sensitivity to IV changes. Entering BPS at high IV Rank exploits mean reversion (IV Crush benefit).

## Pricing

- Free: 3 positions, 10 AI analyses/month, 15-min data refresh
- Pro: 20 positions, 200 AI analyses/month, 1-min refresh, Greeks charts, alert thresholds
